explainerIntro.high: The Nudge Score measures the health of your crypto portfolio. {{score}} = you're doing great!
explainerIntro.medium: The Nudge Score measures the health of your crypto portfolio. {{score}} = needs attention.
explainerIntro.low: The Nudge Score measures the health of your crypto portfolio. {{score}} = needs care now.

diversification.label: DIVERSIFICATION
diversification.good: Your tokens are well spread out
diversification.ok: Could use a bit more diversification

concentrationRisk.label: CONCENTRATION
concentrationRisk.good: No single token dominates too much
